problem id: d87caad1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  01101111 -> 11001001
  00010001 -> 11110111
  00010110 -> 11110100
  10110011 -> 10100110
  01000001 -> 11011111
  10010010 -> 10110110
  11011110 -> 10010011
  00000010 -> 11111110

query: 10100001
predicted answer: 10101111
